title: arifOS Federation Metabolism Envelope
description: The one canonical blood packet every organ must use to talk to every other organ. Converts 7 separate repositories into one governed metabolic loop: sense → route → deliberate → execute → measure → seal → learn.

trace_id.description: Unique trace identifier for the entire metabolic loop. Survives across organ boundaries.

actor_id.description: The agent or human initiating this metabolic cycle. For F13 sovereign actions, this is 'ARIF_FAZIL'.

organ_origin.description: The organ that originated this envelope.

organ_target.description: The organ this envelope is addressed to.

organ_route.description: The chain of organs this envelope has passed through. Append-only audit trail.

intent.description: Natural-language description of what the metabolic cycle intends to accomplish.

evidence_layer.description: Epistemic grounding of the evidence carried in this envelope. F2 TRUTH binding.

autonomy_band.description: The autonomy tier governing this action. Determines escalation path.

reversibility_class.description: Can this action be rolled back? F1 AMANAH binding.

risk_class.description: Blast radius assessment. Determines governance gate level.

required_floor_checks.description: Which constitutional floors must be verified before this action proceeds.

proposed_action.description: The action being proposed or executed. Structure depends on organ_target.

execution_status.description: Current execution state of the metabolic cycle.

measurement_result.description: Quantitative or qualitative result of the action, if completed.

vault_receipt_reference.description: VAULT999 seal ID if this cycle has been sealed. Null until arif_seal completes.

f13_required_boolean.description: Does this action require explicit F13 sovereign (Arif) approval? True = must hold until JITU.

f13_verdict.description: The sovereign's verdict. Only populated by Arif. Null until verdict rendered.

organ_payloads.description: Per-organ payloads attached during the metabolic cycle. Each organ writes its domain-specific output here.

GEOX.description: Earth evidence payload — seismic, petrophysics, basin, prospect data.

WEALTH.description: Capital consequence payload — NPV, risk, allocation, collapse signatures.

WELL.description: Human readiness payload — vitality, fatigue, dignity, metabolic flux.

AAA.description: Control plane payload — routing, cockpit state, agent registry.

arifOS.description: Constitutional judgment payload — floor checks, verdict, G-score.

A-FORGE.description: Execution payload — build, deploy, shell, vault operations.

VAULT999.description: Immutable seal payload — hash chain, seal ID, witness data.
